chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The Meaning of the Names and their derivatives

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/39)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/39)

parts.text: أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام )

text: سُئِلَ عَنْ مَعْنَى اللَّهِ فَقَالَ اسْتَوْلَى عَلَى مَا دَقَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Barqy, from Al Qasim Bin Yahya, from his grandfather Al Hassan Bin Rashid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> was asked about the Meaning of ‘Allah’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The One Who Conquers upon whatever is slight and majestic’.
en.sarwar: 3. A group of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Barqi from al-Qasim ibn Yahya from his grandfather al-Hassan ibn Rashid from abul Hassan Musa ibn Ja‘far (a.s.), who was questioned about the meaning of the word Allah. The Imam replied, “He (Allah) dominates all things small or big.”
